name: JODI Oil
notes: Only consolidated public dataset covering OPEC + non-OECD oil production, demand, stocks, trade. Underused due to clunky UI.

name: OPEC Monthly Oil Market Report (MOMR)
notes: Authoritative OPEC view on demand/supply balance, full report free.

name: IEA Oil Market Report (OMR)
notes: Companion to OPEC MOMR; often diverges in demand outlook.

name: EIA Today in Energy
notes: High-signal short analytical pieces; excellent NLP corpus for narrative/event extraction.

name: EIA Short-Term Energy Outlook (STEO)
notes: Includes full forecast tables for crude, products, gas, power, renewables.

name: EIA Drilling Productivity Report (DPR)
notes: Basin-level rig productivity, DUC inventory; leading indicator for US production.

name: EIA Refinery Capacity / Outages (EIA-820, EIA-810)
notes: Capacity by unit type (CDU, FCC, hydrocracker, reformer); key for crack spread modeling.

name: North Dakota Department of Mineral Resources (DMR)
notes: Director's Cut narrative + granular production, GOR, flaring, well counts. Lag ~60 days.

name: Texas Railroad Commission (RRC)
notes: District-level production; reporting lags can be substantial.

name: Alberta Energy Regulator (AER) ST3 / ST53
notes: Bitumen production, SAGD vs mining split, well-level.

name: Mexico CNH SIH
notes: Pemex + private operators broken out.

name: Brazil ANP
notes: Pre-salt field production detail.

name: Norway Sokkeldirektoratet (NPD) FactPages
notes: Field-level production, reserves, licenses. Best-in-class transparency.

name: UK NSTA
notes: Production by field, well, license.

name: India PPAC
notes: Oil and product consumption monthly; timely India demand signal.

name: Baker Hughes Rig Count
notes: US Friday release; international monthly. Classic activity leading indicator.

name: NOAA / EOG VIIRS Nightfire
notes: Satellite-detected gas flaring; proxy for associated-gas production. Use for Permian, Bakken, Iraq, Russia, Venezuela.

name: PHMSA Pipeline Data
notes: Pipeline incidents, throughput annual reports; useful for disruption analysis.

name: GIE AGSI+ (Gas Storage Europe)
notes: Facility-level gas storage levels, injection/withdrawal. Core EU gas dataset.

name: GIE ALSI (LNG Storage Europe)
notes: Terminal-level send-out, inventory, regasification.

name: ENTSOG Transparency Platform
notes: Physical flows by interconnection point, nominations, capacity bookings.

name: ENTSOG Gas Dashboard
notes: Aggregated supply by corridor (Norway, Russia, North Africa, LNG).

name: ENTSO-E Transparency Platform
notes: Generation by fuel, load, cross-border flows, day-ahead prices, outages.

name: EMBER Electricity Data
notes: Cleaned and harmonized power generation mix by country. Underused for global power analysis.

name: Electricity Maps
notes: Real-time grid carbon intensity and fuel mix.

name: EIA-860 / EIA-923
notes: Plant-level generation and fuel consumption. Foundational for US power modeling.

name: EIA Weekly Natural Gas Storage
notes: Watched closely; results vs survey drive front-month gas.

name: CAISO OASIS / ERCOT / PJM / MISO / NYISO / ISO-NE
notes: LMP, load, generation by fuel, ancillary services.

name: AEMO NEMWEB
notes: Granular Australian power and gas market data.

name: METI Japan Statistics
notes: LNG, coal, oil import volumes and prices.

name: KESIS Korea Energy Statistics
notes: Korean energy demand and imports.

name: EIA Coal Data
notes: Mine-level production, stocks, prices, exports by destination.

name: China NBS Energy / Coal Output
notes: Top-line raw coal output; sparse but official.

name: India Coal Controller (CCO)
notes: Provisional Coal Statistics and dispatch detail.

name: globalCOAL
notes: NEWC reference benchmark; some headline data free.

name: USDA FAS GAIN Attaché Reports
notes: On-the-ground attaché reports — crop conditions, policy, balance estimates. Top NLP corpus for ag fundamentals. Production/Supply/Distribution data in GAIN is attaché estimate, not official USDA.

name: USDA FAS PSD Online
notes: Official global supply/demand balance database. The bedrock.

name: USDA FAS GATS
coverage: US ag trade by commodity / destination
notes: Granular US export/import statistics.

name: USDA NASS Quick Stats
notes: Most granular US ag production database. Crop progress, cattle/hogs inventories, prices received.

name: USDA FAS Crop Explorer
notes: NDVI, soil moisture, precipitation, temperature anomalies by crop region.

name: GEOGLAM Crop Monitor
notes: Multi-agency synthesis of global crop conditions (USDA, FAO, JRC, etc.).

name: EU MARS Bulletin
coverage: EU, Black Sea, North Africa, Middle East
notes: JRC crop monitoring — yield forecasts, agro-meteorological indicators.

name: AMIS Market Monitor
notes: Wheat, maize, rice, soybeans S&D + policy. G20 effort.

name: FAO GIEWS Country Briefs / FPMA
notes: Country-level food security narratives; useful for emerging-market demand context.

name: FAO Food Outlook + Food Price Index
notes: FFPI subindices (cereals, dairy, meat, oils, sugar) widely cited.

name: IGC Grain Market Report (GMR)
notes: International Grains Council balances; free summary, full report paid.

name: Brazil CONAB
notes: Monthly Brazilian crop survey (Levantamento); leads USDA on Brazil balances.

name: Bolsa de Cereales (Buenos Aires Grain Exchange)
notes: Weekly Estimaciones Agrícolas; key Argentine crop progress.

name: BCR Rosario
notes: Complement to Bolsa de Cereales; often cited.

name: APK-Inform / UkrAgroConsult
notes: Key for Black Sea wheat, sunflower, corn flow analysis.

name: ABARES Australia
notes: Australian Crop Report, Commodity outlook.

name: AAFC Canada
notes: Outlook for Principal Field Crops.

name: GASC Egypt Wheat Tenders
notes: Tender results = price-discovery event for global wheat. Track via trade press.

name: MPOB Malaysian Palm Oil Board
notes: End-of-month stocks, production, exports. Market-moving.

name: GAPKI Indonesia Palm Oil
notes: World's largest producer; data less timely than MPOB.

name: ICCO (International Cocoa Organization)
notes: Production, grindings, S&D balance.

name: ICO (International Coffee Organization)
notes: Indicator prices, exports, consumption.

name: CeCafé Brazil
notes: Brazilian coffee export volumes by quality/destination.

name: UNICA UnicaData
notes: Crush volume, sugar mix, ATR; market-moving for sugar.

name: ISO International Sugar Organization
notes: Global sugar balance estimates.

name: USDA AMS Cotton Market News
notes: Spot, classing, mill use.

name: ICAC International Cotton Advisory Committee
notes: Cotton This Month; global S&D.

name: USDA AMS Market News (Livestock + Dairy)
notes: Mandatory Price Reporting — boxed beef, cutout values, hog slaughter.

name: USDA NASS Cattle / Hogs & Pigs / Cold Storage / Milk Production
notes: Key inventory reports — biannual Cattle, quarterly Hogs & Pigs, monthly Milk and Cold Storage.

name: EU Milk Market Observatory
notes: EU milk deliveries, butter/SMP/cheese prices, production.

name: Global Dairy Trade (GDT)
notes: Auction price/volume results; key for WMP, SMP, butter.

name: Meat & Livestock Australia (MLA)
notes: Eastern Young Cattle Indicator, slaughter, exports.

name: Brazil Comex Stat
notes: Beef, soy, sugar, coffee export detail.

name: USGS National Minerals Information Center
notes: Mineral Commodity Summaries (annual) + Minerals Yearbooks. Reference for supply/reserves.

name: ICSG (Copper)
notes: Monthly copper market balance.

name: ILZSG (Lead & Zinc)
notes: Monthly balance + annual statistics.

name: INSG (Nickel)
notes: Monthly nickel market balance.

name: IAI International Aluminium Institute
notes: Primary aluminium production by region; alumina output.

name: LME Market Data (Stocks + COTR)
notes: Warehouse stocks (on/off-warrant, cancelled), positioning reports.

name: SHFE Inventory
notes: Cu, Al, Zn, Ni, etc. in SHFE warehouses.

name: CME / COMEX Metal Stocks
notes: Gold, silver, copper deliverable stocks.

name: worldsteel
notes: Monthly crude steel production by country.

name: CISA (China Iron & Steel Association)
notes: Member mills daily steel output; key for China demand.

name: Mysteel / Steelhome / SMM
notes: Iron ore port inventory, mill margins, steel inventory; some indices free.

name: Australian Office of the Chief Economist — Resources & Energy Quarterly
coverage: Australia commodity exports (iron ore, coal, LNG, gold, etc.)
tags: [metals, energy, iron_ore, coal, lng, australia, forecasts]
notes: Australia is dominant iron ore + coking coal supplier; this is the official outlook.

name: USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries (Critical Minerals)
notes: Lithium, cobalt, graphite, REE, vanadium, tungsten production/reserves.

name: Cobalt Institute
notes: Market reports, supply chain insight.

name: IEA Critical Minerals Data Explorer
notes: Demand projections by scenario.

name: EU JRC Raw Materials Information System (RMIS)
notes: EU criticality assessments, supply chain maps.

name: EITI (Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative)
notes: Detailed extractive industry transparency reports.

name: World Gold Council Goldhub
notes: Gold Demand Trends, central bank purchases.

name: Silver Institute
notes: World Silver Survey (April release).

name: Swiss Federal Customs Office — Swiss-Impex
notes: Switzerland is the major gold refining hub; monthly flow data extremely useful for tracing physical gold (e.g., London → Swiss refiners → Asia).

name: IMF PortWatch
notes: Satellite AIS-derived port activity and chokepoint transit estimates. Free complement to Kpler/Vortexa.

name: UN Comtrade
notes: HS-code level bilateral trade flows. Slow but authoritative.

name: Eurostat Comext
notes: EU trade at CN 8-digit detail.

name: China Customs (GACC)
notes: Monthly imports/exports by HS code and country. Crucial for commodities.

name: US Census USA Trade Online
notes: HTS 10-digit trade detail by port and country.

name: India DGCIS
notes: HS-level imports/exports.

name: Panama Canal Authority
notes: Transit counts, draft restrictions; draft restrictions are real LPG/grain signal.

name: Suez Canal Authority
notes: Transit volumes and revenues; key chokepoint for crude + container.

name: Baltic Exchange Indices (Free Summary)
notes: BDI, BCI, BPI, BSI, BHSI, BDTI, BCTI.

name: Drewry World Container Index
notes: 40ft container spot rates on major lanes.

name: Freightos Baltic Index (FBX)
notes: Daily container spot rates.

name: MarineTraffic
notes: Free vessel tracking, paid for bulk AIS history.

name: VesselFinder
notes: Alternative AIS provider.

name: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (Sentinel-1/2/3/5P)
notes: Sentinel-1 SAR (storage tank levels, ship detection), Sentinel-2 optical (crop NDVI), Sentinel-5P (methane, NO2).

name: NASA Earthdata Search
notes: Unified portal for MODIS, VIIRS, GPM precipitation, SMAP soil moisture, etc.

name: NASA Worldview
notes: Rapid visual browse — useful for storm/fire/dust event monitoring.

name: USGS EarthExplorer (Landsat)
notes: Full Landsat archive back to 1972.

name: GHGSat Pulse
notes: Identified emission events at facility level.

name: Carbon Mapper / Tanager-1
notes: MethaneSAT replacement candidate; Tanager-1 launched 2024.

name: UNEP IMEO MARS
notes: Methane Alert and Response System; notifies governments + public on major leaks.

name: NOAA Climate Prediction Center (CPC)
notes: ENSO ONI, MJO index, drought, degree days.

name: NOAA CPC Heating/Cooling Degree Days
notes: Population-weighted HDD/CDD; key for US natgas/power demand.

name: ECMWF Open Data
notes: Open IFS HRES + ensemble; superior to GFS for many regions.

name: US Drought Monitor
notes: Operational drought severity classification.

name: NOAA NCEI Storm Events
notes: Historical storms, hurricanes — useful for energy/ag disruption back-testing.

name: World Bank Commodity Markets Outlook ("Pink Sheet")
notes: Pink Sheet = standardized monthly commodity prices going back decades.

name: IMF Primary Commodity Prices
notes: Standardized index, used in IMF macro forecasts.

name: RBA Index of Commodity Prices
notes: Reflects iron ore, coal, LNG, gold weights.

name: Bank of Canada BCPI
notes: Heavy weight on energy + agri + metals.

name: St Louis FRED
notes: Convenient aggregator for many commodity price series.

name: CFTC Commitments of Traders (COT, Disaggregated, Supplemental, TFF)
notes: Disaggregated separates Producers/Swap Dealers/Managed Money/Other; TFF separates Dealers/Asset Managers/Hedge Funds.

name: ICE COTR
notes: ICE equivalent to CFTC COT.

name: SEC EDGAR Full-Text Search
notes: Mine 10-K/10-Q/8-K for producer supply guidance, CapEx, hedging, customer concentration.

name: SEDAR+ (Canada NI 43-101)
notes: NI 43-101 technical reports — reserves, grades, production plans for mining.

name: ASX Announcements
notes: JORC reports, production updates from major iron ore + LNG miners.

name: China NBS (National Bureau of Statistics)
notes: Crude steel, refined products, base metals, power output.

name: GACC China Customs (English)
notes: Crude oil, LNG, copper, iron ore, soybeans imports.

name: SAFE State Administration of Foreign Exchange
notes: FX reserves, goods trade BoP detail.

name: Shanghai Futures Exchange / DCE / CZCE
notes: Inventory, OI, positioning for metals (SHFE), ag + energy (DCE), ag + softs (CZCE).

name: Bruegel Datasets
notes: European natural gas tracker, sanctions tracker, EU LNG imports.

name: CREA (Centre for Research on Energy and Clean Air)
notes: Russian oil/gas export tracker post-sanctions; G7 price-cap compliance analysis.

name: Skytruth
notes: NGO satellite analysis of environmental and energy infrastructure.

name: Global Fishing Watch
notes: Useful for vessel-tracking research and shadow fleet analysis.

name: Lloyd's List Intelligence (free items)
notes: Shadow fleet, sanctions, casualty news.

name: TankerTrackers (free items + Twitter/X)
notes: Sanctions-evasion crude flow tracking.

name: CEIC China Premium (with university access)
notes: Best paid source for granular EM data if you can access.
